author: zachmueller
description: Apply spaced repetition algorithms to everything in your vault.

manifest.author: Zach Mueller
manifest.description: Apply spaced repetition algorithms to everything in your vault.
manifest.name: Spaced everything

name: Spaced everything

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Documentation overhaul (no functional changes in this release)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added new setting to select which time zone to capture review timestamps in

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Refactor how frontmatter property updates are handled to fix a race condition when using Capture Thought feature when multiple Contexts are defined in the settings

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Toggle visibility of spacing method settings based on which algorithm is selected
- Auto-append captured thought in cases where the template lacks the main variable
- Auto-generate unique filename for capture thought command if title template leads to clashes with existing files

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Refactored contexts to remove their tie-in to Spacing Method selection, instead allowing users to directly decide which spacing method to apply to each note (via new `se-method` frontmatter property)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Add beta functionality to automatically onboard all notes to Spaced Everything

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Various minor fixes, mostly to settings UI:
- Prevent deletion of spacing method if last one or if in use by a context
- Replace icon with text for add spacing method button
- Derive default spacing method name to avoid odd UI behavior for context dropdown
- Apply spacing method renames to dropdowns in contexts section
- Change input for Capture thought note template to multiline text area for clearer input

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Implement new functionality to facilitate the writing inbox concept, inspired by [Andy Matuschak's notes](https://notes.andymatuschak.org/z5aJUJcSbxuQxzHr2YvaY4cX5TuvLQT7r27Dz)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Update various settings UI text to sentence case to align to the Obsidian plugin guidelines

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Refactor code to better set it up for longer term plans for the plugin.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Renaming and refactoring to support long term plan towards "spaced everything" concept articulated by Andy Matuschak

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Correcting the `id` in the `manifest.json` file to follow Obsidian's guidelines

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Initial plugin release. Includes core/basic functionality for following my spaced writing practice.
